title: $100M Methane-Reuse Project Dedicated at WIN Waste Innovations Near Fostoria
content:
A ceremonial groundbreaking was held Friday for a $100 million project that its developer claims will become one of northwest Ohioâ€™s largest beneficial reuse projects.
The project is being undertaken by Canonsburg, Pa.-based Vision RNG on property owned by the massive WIN Waste Innovations landfill near Fostoria and about an hourâ€™s drive southeast of Toledo. That site is one of Ohioâ€™s largest dumps and has been a controversial one for years, first because of rotten egg-like smells from uncontrolled hydrogen sulfide emissions.
author: Analysts Account
